features.name: firrtl analog type with width constraint
features.description: Code should include a FIRRTL analog type with an explicit width constraint parameter

features.name: firrtl attach operation with multiple analog operands
features.description: Code should include a FIRRTL attach operation connecting multiple analog signals with different width constraints

extraction_summary.note: FIRRTL/MLIR dialect issue - constructs use MLIR syntax not pure SystemVerilog
